steps.t: Poppy Seaton is in Ost Forod, the old watch-post in the hills of Tyrn Fornech. A poster advertising a bounty for the capture or defeat of a tomb-robbe…
Poppy Seaton is in Ost Forod, the old watch-post in the hills of Tyrn Fornech. You have defeated Andy Idden and should now report back to Poppy Seaton…
Basil Gummidge is in Ost Forod, the old watch-post in the hills of Tyrn Fornech. You have defeated Andy Idden and should now report to Basil Gummidge …
